title: Fragile ceasefire faces fresh test as missiles keep flying as Iran, US trade new blows: Key details
summary_full: Tensions in West Asia surged as Iran's IRGC claimed to target a US military base, while Washington announced fresh strikes on Iranian radar and command-and-control sites. Kuwait's air defense systems also responded to drone and missile attacks amid ongoing exchanges and diplomatic efforts.
